description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the rust:latest Docker image and defines two stages: test and deploy_docs. In the test stage add three jobs named test:beta, test:nightly and test:stable; each runs the before_script commands `apt-get update -yqq`, `apt-get install -yqq libluajit-5.1-dev`, and `rustup toolchain add <beta|nightly|stable>` respectively, then executes `cargo +beta test`, `cargo +nightly test` or `cargo +stable test` as its script. In the deploy_docs stage add a pages job that runs `cargo doc`, `mkdir public`, and `mv target/doc/* public`, publishes the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact, and only runs on the master branch.
